what: Neural pipeline tagging scored on dbbe-lingann-fold-v2 (DBBE Byzantine book-epigram gold standard; 7th-15th c. database scope).
protocol: greek.use_neural_pipeline(); CPU sequential (canonical); gold tokenization; official CoNLL-2018 evaluator; one-shot after the 0.44.0 fold rebuilds (leaf-APOS cc->appos converter correction + per-fold gold repairs); greek.evaluate_on_dbbe() (tagging-only, parse=False); fold dbbe-lingann-fold-v2 (sha 14b5496d...), built from coswaele/ByzantineGreekDatasets @ 0b0133a9; vs v1: 11 non-linguistic marker glyphs mis-tagged as words dropped, a standalone '+' segments by form (one 59-token run-on split): 825 sentences / 9,191 tokens; leakage 0
vs_v1: UPOS 86.61->86.74, XPOS 76.34->76.40, UFeats 85.87->85.86, lemma 76.74->76.71 over the corrected token set (the dropped glyphs were near-certain misses; the mapped-tagset and Attic-lemma caveats carry over unchanged)
